top_signals.title: Alphabet stock pops 4% on Dow debut, but the tech giant faces major AI questions
top_signals.summary: Alphabet shares rose Monday as the company joined the Dow, but the blue-chip milestone comes as the stock remains under pressure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thai mother sentenced for trafficking daughter to Tokyo sex trade
top_signals.summary: The mother entered Japan with her daughter in June last year on the pretext of sightseeing before abandoning the girl at the massage parlor, according to a court in Bangkok.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
